checks.endpoint: GET /users?$filter=accountEnabled eq true&$select=id,displayName,userPrincipalName,accountEnabled - filtrare poi per RecipientTypeDetails=SharedMailbox via Exchange
checks.expected_result: Tutti i shared mailbox hanno accountEnabled=false
checks.description: Verificare che tutti gli account associati a shared mailbox abbiano il sign-in bloccato (accountEnabled=false)

title: Ensure sign-in to shared mailboxes is blocked

remediation.description: Eseguire: Set-MsolUser -UserPrincipalName <UPN> -BlockCredential $true oppure via Exchange Admin Center > Recipients > Mailboxes > selezionare shared mailbox e bloccare sign-in.

complexity_notes: Un solo check: verificare che tutti i shared mailbox abbiano BlockCredentials=true (AccountEnabled=false in Entra). Due metodi alternativi: Graph API o Exchange PowerShell.
